channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-14
item.description:
Our community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects recently. The `quest-bih/oddpub` project made significant strides in enhancing its ontogenerator module, with a focus on debugging open data detection for the years 2023-2024. Meanwhile, the `JamieCummins/regcheck` project saw a flurry of activity on its main branch, including updates to the CHANGELOG.md file, a fix for the "iframe remenant issue", and the incorporation of work from the staging branch. Notably, the attention to debugging and issue resolution in both projects highlights the community's commitment to refining and improving its tools. As these projects continue to evolve, we can expect to see even more robust and reliable research tools emerge, ultimately driving progress in the scientific community. By working together and building on each other's advancements, we're creating a stronger, more interconnected ecosystem of open-source research tools.

24 commits across 3 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck, oddpub

Most active:

regcheck21 commits
metacheck2 commits
oddpub1 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where administrative updates were made. The commit message specifically mentions "admin updates", indicating that changes were made to the administrative aspects of the repository. A merge was also performed on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, incorporating changes from the same branch on the remote repository, as indicated by the message "Merge branch 'feature-non-apa-newer' of https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck into feature-non-apa-newer". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch that was modified in these commits. The changes made were limited to administrative updates and a merge operation.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: oddpub: 1 commit today
item.description:
quest-bih/oddpub

The `main` branch was worked on, where the ontogenerator was updated to include debugging for open data detection in the database for the years 2023-2024. The commit specifically mentions "debugging open data detection db 2023-2024", indicating that the focus was on identifying and resolving issues related to open data detection in the specified time frame. No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The ontogenerator is the specific module that was changed, with the goal of enhancing its ability to detect open data. The commit does not mention any additions of new features or modules beyond this debugging effort. The work was limited to a single commit on the `main` branch.

1 commit(s) today:

  • f2850fe [main] debugging open data detection db 2023-2024 — ontogenerator

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The main branch was the primary focus of the recent work, with several commits made to it. On the main branch, the CHANGELOG.md file was updated, as indicated by the commit message "Update CHANGELOG.md". Additionally, the main branch also saw a fix for the "iframe remenant issue", as stated in the commit message "handle iframe remenant issue". The main branch also had a "precheck" locked, as per the commit message "lock precheck (for now!)". The staging branch was also worked on, as evidenced by the merge of this branch into the main branch, with the commit message "Merge branch 'staging'". The staging branch's specific changes are not detailed in these commits, but its work was incorporated into the main branch.

2 commit(s) today:

  • dfc6177 [main] Update CHANGELOG.md — Jamie Cummins
  • 483af6c [main] handle iframe remenant issue — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
